Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************

 Grothendieck construction: the counit

 The Grothendieck construction gives a biequivalence between the
 bicategory of fibrations over a fixed category `C` and the bicategory
 of indexed categories over `C`. To construct this biequivalence, we
 need to construct the following:
 1. A pseudofunctor from the bicategory of fibrations to the bicategory
    of pseudofunctors
 2. A pseudofunctor from the bicategory of pseudofunctors to the
    bicategory of fibrations
 3. The unit and a proof that it is a pointwise adjoint equivalence
 4. The counit and a proof that it is a pointwise adjoint equivalence

 In this file, we construct the fourth part of this biequivalence, namely
 the counit.

 The counit gives a pseudotransformations between two endopseudofunctors
 on the bicategory of pseudofunctors. As such, for every object, we need
 to define a pseudotransformation. This is done in:
   [psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob]
 In addition, we show that the counit is a pointwise adjoint equivalence.
 Since it is a pseudotransformation at every point, we must show that
 that particular pseudotransformation is a pointwise adjoint equivalence.
 This is done in:
   [equiv_psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor]
 Afterwards we construct invertible modifications that witness the
 naturality of this pseudotransformation. This is done in:
   [psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural]
 Collecting all of these data and laws give us the desired
 pseudotransformation.

 Contents
 1. Action of the counit on objects
 2. Action of the counit on 1-cells
 3. The data of the counit
 4. The laws of the counit
 5. The counit

 ************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section GrothendieckConstruction.
  Context {C : univalent_category}.

  (**
   1. Action of the counit on objects
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
functor_data
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
  (F x : univalent_category)

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
functor_data
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
  (F x : univalent_category)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
(indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
→ F x : univalent_category
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
∏
a
 b : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}],
(indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
⟦ a, b ⟧ → (F x : univalent_category) ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
(indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
→ F x : univalent_category
 exact (λ xx, xx).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
∏
a
 b : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}],
(indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
⟦ a, b ⟧
→ (F x : univalent_category)
  ⟦ (λ xx : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}], xx)
      a,
  (λ xx : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}], xx) b
  ⟧
 
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
ff: (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
(F x : univalent_category)
⟦ (λ xx : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}], xx)
    xx,
(λ xx : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}], xx) yy
⟧

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
(F x : univalent_category)
⟦ (λ xx : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}], xx)
    xx,
(λ xx : (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}], xx) yy
⟧

      exact (ff · pr1 ((psfunctor_id F x)^-1) yy).
  Defined.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
is_functor
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_data
     F x)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C
functor_idax
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_data

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 xx = id₁ xx

      exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_rinv (psfunctor_id F x)) xx).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
functor_compax
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_data
     F x)
 
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
ff: (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}] ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}] ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 zz =
ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
· (gg · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 zz =
ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
· (gg · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 zz =
ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 zz

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz) =
ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
ff · (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
ff · (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
ff · (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy · gg = ?t2

        exact (!(nat_trans_ax ((psfunctor_id F x)^-1) _ _ gg)).
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) zz)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) zz)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
     • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))
    • runitor (# F (id₁ x))))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1)
  • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))
 • runitor (# F (id₁ x))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
((id₂ (# F (id₁ x) · # F (id₁ x))
  • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))
 • runitor (# F (id₁ x))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
((# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
 • runitor (# F (id₁ x))) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
• (runitor (# F (id₁ x)) • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x)))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
• id₂ (# F (id₁ x) · id₁ (F x))

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) zz)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise p zz: (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1) zz =
((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
  • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
 • rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))) zz
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) zz)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise p zz: pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz) =
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
· ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz · id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) zz)) =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz))

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q: pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz) =
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
· ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz)
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) =
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
      · ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q: pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz) =
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
· ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz
      · idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
             (id_right (id₁ x))))) =
ff
· (# (# F (id₁ x)) gg
   · (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
      · ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q: pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz) =
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
· ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
     (id_right (id₁ x))) = ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q: pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz) =
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
· ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
     (id_right (id₁ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) zz)
     (runitor (id₁ x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, # F (id₁ x) yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, # F (id₁ x) zz ⟧
p: # F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • ## F (runitor (id₁ x)))
• rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
q: pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz) =
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
· ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) zz
id_right (id₁ x) = runitor (id₁ x)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ univalent_fiber_category
    (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
     is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x, F x ⟧

       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x, F x ⟧

        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x) (F x)

  (univalent_fiber_category

      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x) (F x)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_data F x).

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
∏ a b : F x : univalent_category,
(F x : univalent_category) ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
  ⟦ (λ xx : F x : univalent_category, xx) a,
  (λ xx : F x : univalent_category, xx) b ⟧
 exact (λ xx yy ff, ff · pr11 (psfunctor_id F x) yy).

x: C

     F x) (id₁ xx) =

  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: F x
id₁ xx · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx

      apply id_left.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C

  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data
     F x)
 
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
# (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data
     F x) (ff · gg) =
# (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data
     F x) ff
· # (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data
       F x) gg

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
ff · gg · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) zz =
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (gg · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) zz)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx zz) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (gg · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) zz)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz) =
ff · gg · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) zz

  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
((rinvunitor (# F (id₁ x))

 • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) zz

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)

ff
· (gg
   · ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) zz
      · ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) =
ff · gg · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) zz

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
?b = id₁ ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ x) zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz = ?y'

        apply (psfunctor_idtoiso F _ _).
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) zz)
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) =
id₁ ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ x) zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F h) zz) (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
        (id_right (id₁ x)))) =
id₁ ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ x) zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F h) zz) (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
        (id_right (id₁ x)))) =
pr1 (idtoiso (idpath (# F (id₁ x) zz)))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) zz)
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) zz)
  (id_right (id₁ x)) = idpath (# F (id₁ x) zz)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) zz)
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x)) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) zz)
  (idpath (id₁ x))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy, zz: F x
ff: F x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
gg: F x ⟦ yy, zz ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) zz: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) zz =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) zz)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) zz)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) zz
rinvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x) = idpath (id₁ x)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
(F x : univalent_category)
⟶ (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
(F x : univalent_category)
⟶ (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
is_functor ?F

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
functor_data (F x : univalent_category)
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))[{x}]
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data F x).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
is_functor
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_data
     F x)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv_laws F x).
  Defined.

  Definition psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_unit_data
             (F : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats)
             (x : C)
    : nat_trans_data
        (functor_identity _)
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor F x
         ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv F x)
    := λ _, identity _.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (univalent_fiber_category
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
       F x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_unit_data
     F x)

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (univalent_fiber_category
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
       F x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_unit_data
     F x)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (functor_identity
     (univalent_fiber_category
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x)) ff
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_unit_data
    F x yy =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_unit_data
  F x xx
· # (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
       F x
     ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
         F x) ff

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
        · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
        · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy)

  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
        · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy) = 
?b
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
?b =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy)

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
        · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy)

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx
· # (# F (id₁ x))
    (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
     · (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy = ?t2

    (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy
· (pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) yy = ?t20

        exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_linv (psfunctor_id F x)) yy).

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
ff · id₂ (# F (id₁ x)) yy = ?t2

      apply id_right.

x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx · # (# F (id₁ x)) ff
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy) =

x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (# (id₁ (F x)) ff
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x)
       ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ x) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy) =

  (ff · # (# F (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy)

((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x)))

id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F (id₁ x) yy)

      apply id_left.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy) =
transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff
   · (# (# F (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy))

x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy

transportf (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right (id₁ x))
  (ff · ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy)

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) yy = ?t2

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))

  (ff · ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (linvunitor (id₁ x))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F (id₁ x)) yy: ## F (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) yy
linvunitor (id₁ x) = rinvunitor (id₁ x)

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
functor_identity
  (univalent_fiber_category
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x)
⟹ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
    F x
  ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
      F x

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
functor_identity
  (univalent_fiber_category
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x)
⟹ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
    F x
  ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
      F x

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
nat_trans_data
  (functor_identity
     (univalent_fiber_category
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
       F x)
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity
     (univalent_fiber_category
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor_inv
       F x) ?t

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
nat_trans_data
  (functor_identity
     (univalent_fiber_category

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor F x ∙ # F f)

           (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) f
         ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor F y)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ # F f) ff
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
    F f yy =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
  F f xx
· # (fiber_functor_from_cleaving
       (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
       (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) f
     ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F y) ff

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
    F f yy =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
  F f xx
· (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
     (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f yy)) (id₁ y)
     (transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
        (id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy))

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F x ∙ # F f) yy) =
id₁
  ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
      F x ∙ # F f) xx)
· (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
     (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f yy)) (id₁ y)
     (transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
        (id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F x ∙ # F f) yy) =
id₁
  ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
      F x ∙ # F f) xx)
· (transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
     (id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (indexed_cat_comp_z_iso
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) f (id₁ y) yy)
   · # (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ y)
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (id₁ (# F f yy),,
           is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy) =
id₁ (# F f xx)
· (transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
     (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
     (id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
   · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
   · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f yy))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy))

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
· # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f yy))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy)

  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)

   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)

· id₁ (# F (id₁ y) (# F f yy))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

· id₁ (# F (id₁ y) (# F f yy))

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy = ?t2

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
id₁ (# F f xx) · # (# F f) ff = ?y'

      apply id_left.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor F f) yy: ## F (runitor f) yy =
(((psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  • (# F f ◃ (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1))
 • runitor (# F f)) yy
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor F f) yy: ## F (runitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor F f) yy: ## F (runitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor F f) yy: ## F (runitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy) =
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (# F f yy)

      apply id_right.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor F f) yy: ## F (runitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· ## F (runitor f) yy =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· ## F (runitor f) yy =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· ## F (runitor f) yy = ?b

x, y: C

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
?b = # (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
## F (runitor f) yy = ?t2

      apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
transportf (mor_disp (# F f xx) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy)
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f)) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧

  (id_right f @ ! id_left f)
  (# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy) =
?y'

      apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f)) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1
  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F f))
 • lunitor (# F f)) yy
# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f)) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f)) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy

   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
?b = # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy = ?t2

        exact q.
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
   · # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
   · id₁ (# F f yy)) =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy) =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
id₁ (pr1 (# F f) (# F (id₁ x) yy))
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy =
id₁ (pr1 (# F f) (# F (id₁ x) yy))

      exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise (vcomp_rinv (psfunctor_comp F _ f)) yy).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f)) =
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧

· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
# (# F f) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f))

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
# (# F f) ff
· ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
   · pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy = ?t2

      apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
# (# F f) ff
· ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           pr1 (# F h) yy) (lunitor f))) =
# (# F f) ff · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (id_right f @ ! id_left f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f))

  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
# (# F f) ff
· ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
           pr1 (# F h) yy) (lunitor f))) =

              pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f))))

(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
idtoiso

     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (lunitor f)) =
pr1

         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
        (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
         pr1 (# F h) yy) (runitor f)))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (lunitor f) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
  (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (runitor f)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (lunitor f) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : C^op ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
  ((id_right f @ ! id_left f) @ runitor f)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_lunitor F f) yy: ## F (lunitor f) yy =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f) ^-1 yy
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (# F f yy)
p: # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) f)) yy
· pr1 (## F (lunitor f)) yy
lunitor f = (id_right f @ ! id_left f) @ runitor f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
  F x ∙ # F f
⟹ fiber_functor_from_cleaving
    (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
    (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) f

      F y

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ # F f)

     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) f
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
       F y)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data F f).

  Defined.

f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
is_z_isomorphism
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans
     F f xx)

      apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
  Defined.

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans_data

     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) F

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ X : cat_to_bicat (C ^opp),
bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
    (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
       (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
        is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))

          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) X, F X ⟧
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ (X Y : cat_to_bicat (C ^opp))
(f : cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (?η₁ X · # F f)
  (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
            is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f
   · ?η₁ Y)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
    (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
       (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
        is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
       (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
          (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) X, F X ⟧

        F x) xx)
· pr1

       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
          F) (id₁ x)) xx =
# (pr1
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
        F x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

(xx : pr1
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
               is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
              (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)),
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F f g))
  (pr1
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
        F x) xx)
· pr1
    (pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data_nat
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
          F) (f · g)) xx =
# (pr1 (# F g))
  ((pr11 (pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data_nat
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
               F) f)) xx)
· (pr11 (pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data_nat
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
              F) g))
    (pr1
       (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
             (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
                 is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
                (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f)
       xx)
· # (pr1
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
          F z))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                    (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
                     is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
                    (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))))

  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) xx) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx

        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) xx =
(((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1
  • (# F (id₁ x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))
 • runitor (# F (id₁ x))) xx
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 (# F (id₁ x) xx) = ?b

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)

  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) xx =
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
    (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) xx) · id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx

  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) xx =

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
    (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)) xx) · id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)

  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (runitor (id₁ x)) xx =

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
