  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
maponpaths
  (λ z : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 F) z) xx)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof
       x @ runitor (id₁ x)) =
maponpaths
  (λ z : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 F) z) xx) (idpath (id₁ x))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C ^opp
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_identity_data_subproof x @
runitor (id₁ x) = idpath (id₁ x)

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
∏ (x y z : C ^opp) (f : C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : pr1
        (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
           (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
              (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
               is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
              (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)),
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F f g))
  (pr1
     (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
        F x) xx)
· pr1
    (pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data_nat
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
          F) (f · g)) xx =
# (pr1 (# F g))
  ((pr11 (pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data_nat
            (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
               F) f)) xx)
· (pr11 (pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data_nat
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
              F) g))
    (pr1
       (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
             (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
                 is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
                (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f)
       xx)
· # (pr1
       (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob
          F z))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp
              (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
                 (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                    (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
                     is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
                    (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))))
              f g)) xx)
 
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F f g)) xx
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
    F (g · f) xx =
# (pr1 (# F g))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
     F f xx)
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
    F g (# F f xx)
· ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
                   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
                  (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f
            g)) xx
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F f g)) xx
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F x ∙ # F (g · f)) xx) =
# (pr1 (# F g))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ # F f) xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F y ∙ # F g) (# F f xx))
· ((pr11 (psfunctor_comp
            (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
               (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
                  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
                   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
                  (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f
            g)) xx
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx))

               (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
                  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
  (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F (g · f) xx)) (id₁ z)
  (transportb
     (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
      F z ⟦ # F g (# F f xx), # F z0 xx ⟧)
     (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f
        g)
     (id₁ (# F g (# F f xx))
      · # (# F g) (id₁ (# F f xx))
      · (pr222 (pr1 F)) x y z f g xx)) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
transportb
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
   F z ⟦ # F g (# F f xx), # F z0 xx ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f g)
  (id₁ (# F g (# F f xx)) · # (# F g) (id₁ (# F f xx))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F)) x y z f g xx)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (indexed_cat_comp_z_iso
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) (g · f) (id₁ z) xx)
· # (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ z)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (id₁ (# F (g · f) xx),,
        is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F (g · f) xx))) =
?y'

        
C: univalent_category

f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
transportb
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
   F z ⟦ # F g (# F f xx), # F z0 xx ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f g)
  (id₁ (# F g (# F f xx)) · # (# F g) (id₁ (# F f xx))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F)) x y z f g xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· # (# F (id₁ z)) (id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)) = ?y'

  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
transportb
  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
   F z ⟦ # F g (# F f xx), # F z0 xx ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f g)
  (id₁ (# F g (# F f xx)) · id₁ (# F g (# F f xx))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F)) x y z f g xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· id₁ (# F (id₁ z) (# F (g · f) xx)) = ?y'

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

  (λ z0 : C ⟦ z, x ⟧,
   F z ⟦ # F g (# F f xx), # F z0 xx ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f g)

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)).
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
(pr222 (pr1 F)) x y z f g xx
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
       (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
            f g))
· (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx)) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F f g)) xx

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
(pr222 (pr1 F)) x y z f g xx
· (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
             f g))
   · (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1
        xx
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx))) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_comp F f g)) xx
· id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (g · f)) xx: ## F (runitor (g · f)) xx =
(((psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z)) ^-1
  • (# F (g · f) ◃ (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1))
 • runitor (# F (g · f))) xx
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ z, y ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (g · f)) xx: ## F (runitor (g · f)) xx =
(psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z)) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1
    (pr1 (# F (g · f)) xx) · id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx) = ?t2

xx: pr1

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_F_runitor F (g · f)) xx: ## F (runitor (g · f)) xx =
(psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z)) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1
    (pr1 (# F (g · f)) xx) · id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z)) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (g · f)) xx)
· id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1
    (pr1 (# F (g · f)) xx) · id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z))) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (# F (g · f) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp F (g · f) (id₁ z)) ^-1 xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F z) ^-1 (pr1 (# F (g · f)) xx)

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_category

  (maponpaths
     (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,

     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          f g)) · ## F (runitor (g · f)) xx =

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
?b = id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,
      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          f g)) · ## F (runitor (g · f)) xx = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
## F (runitor (g · f)) xx = ?t2

        apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,
      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
     (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
          f g))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, z ⟧,
        pr1 (# F h) xx) (runitor (g · f))) =
id₁ (# F (g · f) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
        (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof
             f g) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, z ⟧,
         pr1 (# F h) xx) (runitor (g · f)))) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (idpath ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ g · f) xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f
       g) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   pr1 (# F h) xx) (runitor (g · f)) =
idpath ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ g · f) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 F) z0) xx)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f
       g @ runitor (g · f)) =
idpath ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ g · f) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 F) z0) xx)
  (! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f
       g @ runitor (g · f)) =
maponpaths
  (λ z0 : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, z ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 F) z0) xx) (idpath (g · f))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y, z: C ^opp
f: C ^opp ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ^opp ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: pr1
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x)
! fiber_functor_from_cleaving_comp_data_subproof f g @
runitor (g · f) = idpath (g · f)

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) F

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) F

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) F
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_laws ?τ

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_data
  (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
     (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
        (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
         is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) F
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob F).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
pstrans_from_cat_into_cat_laws
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_data_on_ob F)
 exact (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_laws_on_ob F).
  Defined.

  (**
   2. Action of the counit on 1-cells
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
             {F G : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats}
             (τ : pstrans F G)
             (x : C)
    : nat_trans_data
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x)
        (fiber_functor
           (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ))
           x
           ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor G x)
    := λ _, identity _.

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
is_nat_trans
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x)
  (fiber_functor
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
       G x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
     τ x)

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
is_nat_trans
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x)
  (fiber_functor
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
       G x)
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
     τ x)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) ff
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
    τ x yy =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
  τ x xx
· # (fiber_functor
       (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
          (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
     ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         G x) ff

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) ff =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
  τ x xx
· # (fiber_functor
       (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
          (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
     ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         G x) ff

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
     F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) ff =
# (fiber_functor
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
   ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
       G x) ff

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# ((pr111 τ) x) (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
# (τ x) ff
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# ((pr111 τ) x) ff
· # ((pr111 τ) x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
# (τ x) ff
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# ((pr111 τ) x) ff
· # ((pr111 τ) x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
# (τ x) ff
· (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
# ((pr111 τ) x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv τ x) yy: ((psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x)) ^-1
 • (τ x ◃ (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1)) yy =
((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ τ x) • lunitor (τ x))
 • rinvunitor (τ x)) yy
# ((pr111 τ) x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv τ x) yy: (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (pr1 (τ x) yy) =
# (pr1 (τ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
· id₁ (τ x yy) · id₁ (τ x yy)
# ((pr111 τ) x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
xx, yy: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x
ff: univalent_fiber_category
  (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
   is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)) x ⟦ xx, yy ⟧
p: (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x)) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (pr1 (τ x) yy) =
# (pr1 (τ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy)
# ((pr111 τ) x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 yy) =
pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ (id₁ x))) ^-1 yy
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) ^-1 (τ x yy)

    exact (!p).
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
  F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x
⟹ fiber_functor
    (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
       (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
  ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
      G x

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x: C
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
  F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x
⟹ fiber_functor
    (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
       (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ)) x
  ∙ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
      G x

τ: pstrans F G
x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
psnaturality_of
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob F · τ) f
• (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
        (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
           (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
            is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f
   ◃ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ
       y) =
(psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ x
 ▹ # G f)
• psnaturality_of
    (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
       (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
          (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
          (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G))
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor C τ))
     · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob G) f

x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏
x0 : indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
       (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
           is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
          (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x,
(psnaturality_of
   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob F · τ) f
 • (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
         (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
             is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
            (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f
    ◃ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ
        y)) x0 =
((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ x
  ▹ # G f)
 • psnaturality_of
     (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
        (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G))
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor C τ))
      · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob G) f)

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏
x0 : indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
       (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
          (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
           is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
          (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x,
(psnaturality_of
   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob F · τ) f
 • (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
         (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
             is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat

((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ x
  ▹ # G f)
 • psnaturality_of
     (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
        (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G))
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor C τ))
      · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob G) f)

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
  (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
     (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x
(psnaturality_of
   (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob F · τ) f
 • (# (indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
         (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
            (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
             is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
            (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)))) f
    ◃ psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ
        y)) xx =
((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_data τ x
  ▹ # G f)
 • psnaturality_of
     (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
        (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
           (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G))
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor C τ))
      · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob G) f)
  xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
  (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
     (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
       F f xx) · id₁ ((pr111 τ) y (# F f xx))
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
    τ y (# F f xx) =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
     τ x xx)
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
       G f (τ x xx) · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
  (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
     (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
       F f xx) · id₁ ((pr111 τ) y (# F f xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F y ∙ (pr111 τ) y) (# F f xx)) =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_nat_trans_data
       G f (τ x xx) · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp)
f: cat_to_bicat (C ^opp) ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_psfunctor
  (cleaving_to_indexed_cat
     (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F),,
      is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
     (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))) x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx))
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y (# F f xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F y ∙ (pr111 τ) y) (# F f xx)) =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx))
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y (# F f xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F y ∙ (pr111 τ) y) (# F f xx)) =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx))
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y (# F f xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F y ∙ (pr111 τ) y) (# F f xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx))
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y (# F f xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        F y ∙ (pr111 τ) y) (# F f xx)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x

· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))

       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx)) = ?y'

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx = ?y'

      apply id_left.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx)) =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)

                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity

                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· # (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
    (id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F x ∙ # F f) xx)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C

xx: F x
# (pr1 ((pr111 τ) y))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ # F f) xx)) = ?t2

      refine (functor_id (pr111 τ y) _).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx
· id₁ ((pr111 τ) y ((pr211 F) x y f xx)) =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx

                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)

                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat

                       (id₁ (# F f xx))

                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf

            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx =
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx

                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx))) = pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
# (pr1 (# G f))
  (id₁
     ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
         F x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx))
· (id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
   · id₁
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
   · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
   · (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
        (make_is_z_isomorphism
           (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
            · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
           (psnaturality_of τ f xx
            · # (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
              (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                 (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx))),,
                  is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (id₁ (# F f xx))
                       (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                          (# F f xx)))))
              (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                 (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                    (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                    (# F f ∙ τ y)
                    (psnaturality_of τ f)
                    (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
        (id₁ y)
        (transportf
           (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
            G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b = pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

           (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
           (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))
   · id₁ (τ y (# F f xx))) = ?b

F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
