                (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                (id₁ (# F f xx))
                (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                      (# F f xx)))))
        (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
           (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
              (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                       (# F f xx))),,
               is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                       (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
              (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                 (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                 (# F f ∙ τ y) (psnaturality_of τ f)
                 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
     (id₁ y)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
        (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
        (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx))) =
?b0
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b0 = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx)) · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
· (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
     (make_is_z_isomorphism
        (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
         · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
        (psnaturality_of τ f xx
         · # (τ y)
             (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                (id₁ (# F f xx))
                (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                      (# F f xx)))))
        (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
           (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
              (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                       (# F f xx))),,
               is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                       (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
              (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                 (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                 (# F f ∙ τ y) (psnaturality_of τ f)
                 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
     (id₁ y)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
        (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
        (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx))) =
?b0

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx)) · id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)) =
?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ ((pr211 G) x y f (τ x xx))
· id₁
    ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
        G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx)) = ?y'

        apply id_left.
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁
  ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
      G x ∙ # G f) (τ x xx))
· (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
     (make_is_z_isomorphism
        (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
         · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
        (psnaturality_of τ f xx
         · # (τ y)
             (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                (id₁ (# F f xx))
                (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                      (# F f xx)))))
        (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
           (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
              (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                       (# F f xx))),,
               is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                    (id₁ (# F f xx))
                    (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                       (# F f xx)))))
           (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
              (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                 (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                 (# F f ∙ τ y) (psnaturality_of τ f)
                 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
     (id₁ y)
     (transportf
        (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
        (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
        (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx))) = 
?b

      apply id_left.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)
  (make_is_z_isomorphism
     (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
      · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
     (psnaturality_of τ f xx
      · # (τ y)
          (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
             (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
             (id₁ (# F f xx))
             (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                (id₁ (# F f xx))
                (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f xx)))))
     (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
        (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
           (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
              (id₁ (# F f xx))
              (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f xx))),,
            is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
              (id₁ (# F f xx))
              (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                 (id₁ (# F f xx))
                 (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f xx)))))
        (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
           (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
              (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f) (# F f ∙ τ y)
              (psnaturality_of τ f)
              (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx))))
  (id₁ y)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
      G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
     (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
     (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (indexed_cat_comp_z_iso
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G) f (id₁ y) (τ x xx))
· # (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ id₁ y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
        · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx,,
        make_is_z_isomorphism
          (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
           · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
          (psnaturality_of τ f xx
           · # (τ y)
               (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_inv
                  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                  (id₁ (# F f xx))
                  (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                     (id₁ (# F f xx))
                     (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                        (# F f xx)))))
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx))),,
                 is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
             (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                   (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                   (# F f ∙ τ y) (psnaturality_of τ f)
                   (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx)))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (indexed_cat_comp_z_iso
       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G) f (id₁ y) (τ x xx))
· # (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ id₁ y)
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
        · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx,,
        make_is_z_isomorphism
          (# (τ y) (id₁ (# F f xx))
           · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) ^-1 xx)
          (psnaturality_of τ f xx
           · # (τ y)
               (cartesian_factorisation
                  (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                     (id₁ (# F f xx))
                     (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                        (# F f xx))) (id₁ y)
                  (indexed_cat_id
                     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
                     ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ f)
                        xx)
                   · indexed_cat_comp
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) f
                       (id₁ y) xx)
                · inv_from_z_iso
                    (indexed_cat_id_z_iso
                       (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                       (# F f xx))))
          (is_inverse_in_precat_comp
             (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat (τ y)
                (is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_left
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx))),,
                 is_cartesian_to_iso_indexed_cat_right
                   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                   (id₁ (# F f xx))
                   (is_cartesian_indexed_cat
                      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
                      (id₁ (# F f xx))
                      (is_z_isomorphism_identity
                         (# F f xx)))))
             (is_inverse_in_precat_inv
                (is_invertible_2cell_to_is_nat_z_iso_subproof
                   (F x) (G y) (τ x ∙ # G f)
                   (# F f ∙ τ y) (psnaturality_of τ f)
                   (pr2 (psnaturality_of τ f)) xx)))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y))
    (psnaturality_of τ f xx
     · # (τ y)
         (is_cartesian_indexed_cat_factorisation
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
            (is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f xx))
            (id₁ y)
            (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
             · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx)
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1
              (# F f xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y))
    (psnaturality_of τ f xx
     · # (τ y)
         (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
          · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
          · inv_from_z_iso
              (indexed_cat_comp_z_iso
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) f
                 (id₁ y) xx)
          · # (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ id₁ y)
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (id₁ (# F f xx),,
                  is_z_isomorphism_identity (# F f xx)))
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1
              (# F f xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y))
    (psnaturality_of τ f xx
     · # (τ y)
         (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
          · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1
              xx · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1
              (# F f xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y))
    (psnaturality_of τ f xx
     · # (τ y)
         (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
          · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1
              xx · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1
              (# F f xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b = pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y))
    (psnaturality_of τ f xx
     · # (τ y)
         (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
          · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1
              xx · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1
              (# F f xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y))
    (psnaturality_of τ f xx
     · # (τ y)
         (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
          · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1
              xx · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
          · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1
              (# F f xx))) = ?y'

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
psnaturality_of τ f xx
· # (τ y)
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
     · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx)) =
?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
psnaturality_of τ f xx
· # (τ y)
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
     · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx)) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b = ?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
psnaturality_of τ f xx
· # (τ y)
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
     · # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx)) =
?b

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
· # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx) = ?t20

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
· # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx)) = ?y'

· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
· # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx)) = ?b

F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b = ?y'

· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
· # (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx)) = ?b

τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
# (# F (id₁ y)) (id₁ (# F f xx)) = ?t20

          apply functor_id.

F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
· id₁ (# F (id₁ y) (# F f xx)) = ?y'

        apply id_right.

     · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx)) =
?t2

     · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx)) =

· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx) = ?t20

· (pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
   · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx) =

F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y)) xx
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ y))) ^-1 xx = 
?t20

          exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
                   (vcomp_rinv (psfunctor_comp F f (identity y)))
                   xx).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
· id₂ (# F f · # F (id₁ y)) xx = ?y'

        apply id_right.

· # (τ y)
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
     · pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx)) =
?t2

xx: F x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) (# F f xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_id F y)) ^-1 (# F f xx) = ?t21

          exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
                   (vcomp_rinv (psfunctor_id F y))
                   _).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
# (τ y) (id₂ (id₁ (F y)) (pr1 (# F f) xx)) = ?t20

        apply functor_id.
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
psnaturality_of τ f xx · id₁ (τ y (pr1 (# F f) xx)) =
?t2

      apply id_right.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b = pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
   · (# (# G (id₁ y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)))) =
?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
# (# G (id₁ y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (τ y (# F f xx)) = ?t2

      apply (nat_trans_ax ((psfunctor_id G y) ^-1)).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
   · ((psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx))
      · # (id₁ (G y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx))) =
pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
   · ((psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx))
      · # (id₁ (G y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx))) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx))
· # (id₁ (G y)) (psnaturality_of τ f xx) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· pr1 ((pr211 τ) x y f) xx

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
?b = id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   G y ⟦ # G f (τ x xx), # G z (τ x xx) ⟧)
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f)
  (id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))) = ?y'

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
id₁ (# G f (τ x xx))
· pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
    ((pr111 τ) x xx) = ?y'

      apply id_left.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
  ((pr111 τ) x xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(((psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  • (# G f ◃ (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1))
 • runitor (# G f)) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
  ((pr111 τ) x xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
  ((pr111 τ) x xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
  ((pr111 τ) x xx)
· (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
   · (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx))) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
  ((pr111 τ) x xx)
· (pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
   · (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
?b = id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x

  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
pr1 (pr2 (psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y))) ^-1 (τ x xx)
· (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1 (# G f (τ x xx)) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))

      apply (!(id_right _)).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
pr1 (## G (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f))
  ((pr111 τ) x xx)
· ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
## G
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f • runitor f)
  ((pr111 τ) x xx) = id₁ (# G f ((pr111 τ) x xx))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
## G
  (fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f • runitor f)
  ((pr111 τ) x xx) = ## G (id₂ f) ((pr111 τ) x xx)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ y, x ⟧
xx: F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_F_runitor G f)
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx): ## G (runitor f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx) =
(psfunctor_comp G f (id₁ y)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G y) ^-1
    (pr1 (# G f) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
· id₁ (# G f (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
fiber_functor_natural_data_subproof f • runitor f =
id₂ f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: pstrans F G

  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob F · τ)
  (indexed_functor_to_pstrans
     (cartesian_disp_functor_to_indexed_functor
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F))
        (indexed_cat_to_cleaving
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G))
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor C τ))
   · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob G)

  (**
   3. The data of the counit

pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C))

        bicat_of_univ_cats))

∏
X : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
    (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C) X,
id_psfunctor
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) X ⟧
C: univalent_category
∏
(X
 Y : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X
   · # (id_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
             bicat_of_univ_cats)) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f
   · ?η₁ Y)

    
C: univalent_category
∏
X : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
    (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C) X,
id_psfunctor
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) X ⟧
 exact psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob.

   · psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob Y)
 exact @psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural.
  Defined.

  (**
   4. The laws of the counit

C: univalent_category
is_pstrans psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data

  
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data

    
C: univalent_category
∏
(X
 Y : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f
 g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X
 ◃ ##
     (id_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats)) α)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Y f
• (##
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) α
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Y)
C: univalent_category
∏
X : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id
     (id_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats)) X)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X X
    (id₁ X) =
(runitor
   (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X)
 • linvunitor
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) X
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X)
C: univalent_category
∏
(X Y
 Z : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp
     (id_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats)) f g)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Z
    (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
               bicat_of_univ_cats)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
               bicat_of_univ_cats)) g)
    • (pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Y
         f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor
              (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
                 bicat_of_univ_cats)) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f)
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
                bicat_of_univ_cats)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f
     ◃ pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Y Z
         g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) g)
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f g
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Z)

    
C: univalent_category
∏
(X
 Y : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f
 g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X
 ◃ ##
     (id_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats)) α)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Y g =
pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Y f
• (##
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) α
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Y)

 ◃ ##
     (id_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats)) m)

     (comp_psfunctor

∏ X : cat_to_bicat C^op,
((pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data F₁
  ◃ ##
      (id_psfunctor
         (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
            bicat_of_univ_cats)) m)
 • pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data F₁ F₂ n₂)

          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
pr1 ((pr111 m) x) xx =
psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
  n₁ x xx
· (m x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) ^-1 (n₂ x xx))

  F₁ x

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) ^-1 (n₂ x xx) =
id₁ (n₂ x xx)

      exact (nat_trans_eq_pointwise
               (vcomp_rinv (psfunctor_id F₂ x))
               (pr1 (pr111 n₂ x) xx)).

  ((pr122 (pr1 F)) x xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data C F x
          xx)
   · (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx)
· pr1 ((pr122 F) x) ^-1 xx = id₁ xx

          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
transportf (mor_disp xx xx) (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F)) x xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data C F x
          xx)
   · (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx)
· pr1 ((pr122 F) x) ^-1 xx = ?b

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
(pr122 (pr1 F)) x xx
· # (# F (id₁ x))
    (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data C F x xx)
· (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) · pr1 ((pr122 F) x) ^-1 xx =
id₁ xx

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor

(pr122 (pr1 F)) x xx
· # (# F (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) · pr1 ((pr122 F) x) ^-1 xx =
id₁ xx

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)

  F x
(pr122 (pr1 F)) x xx
· # (# F (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) xx)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) · pr1 ((pr122 F) x) ^-1 xx =
(psfunctor_id F x • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1) xx

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) xx =
((linvunitor (# F (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) xx
# (# F (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor

          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) xx =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx
# (# F (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx = ?b

xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) xx =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx
# (# F (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· (pr222 (pr1 F)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x))) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx

          
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F (id₁ x)) xx: ## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) xx =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x) xx
# (# F (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx) =
id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)
· # (pr1 (# F (id₁ x))) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)

          exact (!(id_left _)).
        
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
## F (linvunitor (id₁ x)) xx = ?y'

        apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) xx)
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # F h xx)
       (id_right (id₁ x))) = id₁ (# F (id₁ x) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F h) xx) (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # F h xx)
        (id_right (id₁ x)))) =
pr1 (idtoiso (idpath (# F (id₁ x) xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) xx)
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # F h xx)
  (id_right (id₁ x)) = idpath (# F (id₁ x) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) xx)
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x)) =
idpath (# F (id₁ x) xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) xx)
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x)) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) xx)
  (idpath (id₁ x))

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F x
linvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x) = idpath (id₁ x)

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
∏
(X Y
 Z : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp
     (id_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats)) f g)
• pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Z
    (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
               bicat_of_univ_cats)) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor
            (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
               bicat_of_univ_cats)) g)
    • (pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data X Y
         f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor
              (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
                 bicat_of_univ_cats)) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
             (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f)
       (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor
             (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
                bicat_of_univ_cats)) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f
     ◃ pr2 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Y Z
         g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor
           (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
           (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) g)
     (pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor
        (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
        (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)) f g
   ▹ pr1 psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data Z)
 
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x))
    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
       τ x xx) · id₁ ((pr111 θ) x (τ x xx))
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
    θ x (τ x xx) · id₁ (θ x (τ x xx))
· (transportf
     (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
        ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
     (id_right (id₁ x))
     ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
      · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data
             C τ θ x xx)
      · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
   · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))) =
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x))
    (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
       τ x xx) · id₁ ((pr111 θ) x (τ x xx))
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
    θ x (τ x xx) · id₁ (θ x (τ x xx))
· (transportf
     (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
        ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
     (id_right (id₁ x))
     ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
      · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data
             C τ θ x xx)
      · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
   · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
?b = id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· # (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x))

       τ x xx) · id₁ ((pr111 θ) x (τ x xx))
· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data

· (transportf
     (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
        ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
     (id_right (id₁ x))
     ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
      · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))

             C τ θ x xx)

          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
   · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1

· psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data

F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x))
  (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_natural_nat_trans_data
     τ x xx) = ?t2

          apply functor_id.
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· id₁
    ((pr111 θ) x
       ((psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data_ob_data_functor
           F₁ x ∙ (pr111 τ) x) xx)) = ?y'

        apply id_right.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· (transportf
     (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
        ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
     (id_right (id₁ x))
     ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
      · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data
             C τ θ x xx)
      · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
   · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))) =
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data C τ
          θ x xx)
   · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (pstrans_to_indexed_functor θ x)
             (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
                (pstrans_to_indexed_functor τ) x xx)))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
?b = id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
transportf
  (mor_disp (θ x (τ x xx))
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x))
  ((pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
   · (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))) = ?y'

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
(pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
id₁ ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
(pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
(psfunctor_id F₃ x • (psfunctor_id F₃ x) ^-1)
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
(pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
psfunctor_id F₃ x (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· (psfunctor_id F₃ x) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
(pr122 (pr1 F₃)) x (θ x (τ x xx))
· (# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
   · ((pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
        ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
      · (idtoiso
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
              (id_right (id₁ x)))
         · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
             ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))))) =
psfunctor_id F₃ x (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· (psfunctor_id F₃ x) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· ((pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
   · (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
           (id_right (id₁ x)))
      · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))) =
(psfunctor_id F₃ x) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· ((pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
     ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
   · (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
           (id_right (id₁ x)))
      · pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
          ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))) =
id₁ (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))
· (psfunctor_id F₃ x) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x)))
· pr1 ((pr122 F₃) x) ^-1
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
id₁ (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))
· (psfunctor_id F₃ x) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) ((pr111 τ) x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x))) =

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
?b = id₁ (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
?b = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)) =
((linvunitor (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F₃ x ▹ # F₃ (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx)))
· (pr222 (pr1 F₃)) x x x (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (θ x) (τ x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))

          exact (!(id_left _)).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)) = ?y'

        apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
       (id_right (id₁ x))) =
id₁ (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₃ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
        (id_right (id₁ x)))) =
pr1 (idtoiso (idpath (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 θ) x) (pr1 ((pr111 τ) x) xx)))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   # F₃ h ((pr111 θ) x ((pr111 τ) x xx)))
  (id_right (id₁ x)) =
idpath (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h) (θ x (τ x xx)))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x)) =
idpath (# F₃ (id₁ x) (θ x (τ x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h) (θ x (τ x xx)))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x)) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h) (θ x (τ x xx))) (idpath (id₁ x))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
τ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
θ: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
x: cat_to_bicat C^op
xx: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor
          (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
          (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C)))
  F₁ x
linvunitor (id₁ x) @ id_right (id₁ x) = idpath (id₁ x)

      apply homset_property.
      Opaque comp_psfunctor.
  Qed.
  Transparent comp_psfunctor.

  (**
   5. The counit
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C))
  (id_psfunctor
     (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats))

  
C: univalent_category
pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C))
  (id_psfunctor
     (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats))

    
C: univalent_category
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C))
  (id_psfunctor
     (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats))
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans ?η

    
C: univalent_category
pstrans_data
  (comp_psfunctor (psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_bicat C)
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib C))
  (id_psfunctor
     (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats))
 exact psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data.
    
C: univalent_category
is_pstrans psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_data
 exact psfunctor_fib_to_psfunctor_counit_is_pstrans.
  Defined.
End GrothendieckConstruction.
